arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the route table.

associations.description: A list of associations between the route table and subnets or gateways.

gateway_id.description: The ID of the gateway associated with the route table.

id.description: The unique identifier for the route table.

owner_id.description: The AWS account ID of the owner of the route table.

route_table_id.description: The ID of the route table.

routes.description: A list of routes in the route table.

subnet_id.description: The ID of the subnet associated with the route table.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the route table.

vpc_id.description: The ID of the VPC where the route table is located.
